title: Resolution No. 17 of 2020 Promulgating the Fifth National Telecommunications Plan
summary: Set the prior national roadmap for 5G-enabled IoT and machine-to-machine services, including spectrum release, innovation use cases, and possible M2M or IoT-specific MVNO licensing models before the Sixth National Telecommunications Plan.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Previous national telecommunications plan supporting 5G, IoT and M2M development.

notes: Related instruments: Superseded by Sixth National Telecommunications Plan 2023 to 2026
